entities.name: TECHNOLOGY EVALUATION
entities.description: The process of assessing agricultural technologies through case studies)

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where the technology evaluation case studies were conducted)

entities.name: ON-FARM TESTS
entities.description: Tests of technology conducted on farms, distinguished as either on-farm trials or farmers' tests)

entities.name: ON-FARM TRIALS
entities.description: A type of on-farm test managed by researchers to control variation)

entities.name: FARMERS' TESTS
entities.description: A type of on-farm test managed by farmers)

entities.name: MULTILOCATIONAL TESTING
entities.description: A method of testing advanced varieties across multiple locations)

entities.name: ADVANCED VARIETIES
entities.description: Improved crop versions used in multilocational testing)

entities.name: INTERCROPPING COMBINATIONS
entities.description: The practice of planting different crops together, used as a test factor in on-farm trials)

entities.name: MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The execution of test operations, which can be a test factor in farmers' tests)
